title: Perfect server side mods
description: Easy blueprint for starting any fabric server, with good performance and useful features to manage and play with sticking close to vanilla
body:
Perfect blueprint to use to start a server with if you have never ran a server before, designed for small to medium Survival server, if you are trying to run a larger server this may be a good starting point but would require a lot of customisation

If you want to have bedrock players be able to join be sure to add geyser serperately

Currently on 1.21 but will update as mod support becomes available on future versions, I have ran many servers and made this mistake once and it was not a good player experience
